content:
Goal
* Examples should not replace formal specification. Consider revising the statement to explicitly state both orientations of each emoticon. "Space-separated" is also omitted in this section for simplification.

You are given a string of emoticons whose moods differ by expression. The happiness for each expression, in descending order, is shown below. Since people may lean either left or right, each expression can appear in two orientations.

+1 {{:)}} or {{(:}}
0 {{:|}} or {{|:}}
-1 {{:(}} or {{):}}

Input
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and follow the presentation in the example there. In particular, add line numbers, variable types and descriptions where they're missing.

Constraints
* Please add the constraint for [[n]], specifying its lower and upper bounds.

Cases
* Current expected output distribution:
  • :) - 1 test and 0 validators
  • :| - 3 tests and 3 validators
  • :( - 1 test and 2 validators
  Please add more cases so the distribution is more balanced, with more :) and :( results. Also randomise the input strings to reduce long runs of the same emoticon appearing consecutively.

Thanks.
Sorry, I had realized I had missed some of the guidelines after I published it, and was updating when I received the notification for your comment. I'll try update the rest soon.
Sure, please let me know when you've finished, and I'll take another look.
